faqs.question: Why does Spuyten Duyvil have such a mosquito problem?
faqs.answer: Spuyten Duyvil's location between the Harlem and Hudson Rivers, combined with its lush vegetation and proximity to wetlands, creates ideal breeding conditions for mosquitoes. Standing water in yards, clogged gutters, and shaded areas near the waterfront all contribute to high mosquito populations during warm months.

faqs.answer: Our mosquito control services in Spuyten Duyvil range from $125 to $325, depending on property size, infestation severity, and treatment frequency. We offer one-time treatments as well as seasonal packages for ongoing protection. We provide free inspections and customized quotes for your specific property needs.

faqs.question: How often should I get mosquito treatments for my Spuyten Duyvil property?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection, we recommend treatments every 3-4 weeks during mosquito season (April through October). Properties near the waterfront or with heavy vegetation may benefit from more frequent treatments. Our technicians will assess your property and recommend a treatment schedule that keeps mosquitoes under control throughout the season.

faqs.question: Are your mosquito control treatments safe for pets and children near the waterfront?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for families and pets when applied correctly. Our treatments target mosquito breeding areas and resting spots while minimizing environmental impact. We provide clear instructions on re-entry times and take special care with properties near the rivers and natural areas that Spuyten Duyvil residents cherish.
